# Josef Kvapil

> Frontend architect and team lead in Liberec, Czech Republic. Architects React
> and TypeScript platforms for banking, energy and insurance at Trask; builds
> open-source tooling that keeps frontend code honest. AI-assisted development
> practitioner since the GitHub Copilot closed beta — enthusiastic precisely
> because he knows its limits.

The site is one page in two languages: https://jkvapil.cz (English) and
https://jkvapil.cz/cs/ (Czech). Its hero narrates six steps of frontend craft
on a single button: architecture, TypeScript contracts, design systems,
accessibility, review & AI leverage, delivery.

## Capabilities

- Platform & microfrontend architecture: shells, federated modules, typed
  seams; architected a core-system rebuild for a major insurance group with a
  framework used daily by dozens of developers
- Leading frontend teams: review culture, mentoring, the same quality bar for
  everyone
- Delivery in regulated industries: banking, insurance, energy — KYC flows,
  e-signing, SAP-integrated portals
- Analysis & client communication: requirements, target architecture,
  functional specifications, man-day estimates
- AI-first development, human-verified: own agent tooling, internal talks,
  against pure vibecoding

## Open source

- [biome-you-might-not-need-an-effect](https://github.com/wraithyy/biome-you-might-not-need-an-effect): Biome linter plugin detecting unnecessary React useEffect hooks
- [construe](https://github.com/wraithyy/construe): natural language to validated structured output, React-first
- [companion](https://github.com/wraithyy/companion): desktop app reacting to Claude Code activity via hooks
- [openclaw-guardian](https://github.com/wraithyy/openclaw-guardian): rate-limit-aware proxy and session healer for the Claude API

- Email: josef0kvapil@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/wraithyy
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josef-kvapil
